- Engine health degraded; thrust adjusted to ensure performance under failure conditions.
- Obstacle proximity is critical; conservative elevator and autopilot behavior is necessary.
- High TCAS conflict level; autopilot mode and manual override may be prioritized for safety.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
